## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in the official CAIF repository.

## Contribution type

- [ ] Framework documentation
- [ ] Standard
- [ ] Weakness register
- [ ] Finding register

## Evidence and review notes

Explain the evidence, references, or reasoning behind this change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is vendor-neutral.
- [ ] Security claims are supported by evidence.
- [ ] Links and references are reviewable.
- [ ] I have followed the Code of Conduct and contribution guidance.
